title: Slice 3: Authoring Funnel Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for the AuthoringService (Spark-Shape-Specify-Decompose-Approve funnel) with postures and analytical passes.
notes: Implementation plan with proto/code scaffolding rather than a formal PRD/ADR/SPEC; contains technical contract details (proto messages) that could partially inform SPEC-level constraints, but overall structure is task-by-task execution guidance, so classified as DOC.
